'''√r-p-b''' ('''rapaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quitch|quitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quitch|quitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| rapaba
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || rapabithi || rapabiji || rapabishi || rapabi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || rapabuthuth || rapabujuj || rapabushush || rapab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || rapabuthu || rapabuju || rapabushu || rapabu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || rapabufuth || rapabufuj || rapabufush || rapabuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rapabethe || rapabeje || rapabeshe || rapabe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rapabothoth || rapabojoj || rapaboshosh || rapab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rapabotho || rapabojo || rapabosho || rapabo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rapabofoth || rapabofoj || rapabofosh || rapabof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rapabïf || rapabïf || rapabïf || rapabïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rapabïfïf || rapabïfïf || rapabïfïf || rapabïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rapabïf || rapabïf || rapabïf || rapabïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rapabïf || rapabïf || rapabïf || rapabïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || rapabæthæ || rapabæjæ || rapabæshæ || rapabæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rapabathath || rapabajaj || rapabashash || rapab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rapabatha || rapabaja || rapabasha || rapaba
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rapabafath || rapabafaj || rapabafash || rapabaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || rapabasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gorapabasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokirapabasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || rapabnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gorapabnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokirapabnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || rapabshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gorapabnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokirapabshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || rapabroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gorapabnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokirapabroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || rapabmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gorapabnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokirapabmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || rapabsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gorapabnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokirapabsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || rapabngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gorapabnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokirapabngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || rapabyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gorapabnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokirapabyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || rapabyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gorapabnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokirapabyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || rapabnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gorapabnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokirapabnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || rapabnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gorapabnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirapabnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || rapabnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gorapabnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokirapabnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || rapabshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gorapabnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokirapabshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || rapabshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gorapabnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirapabshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || rapabshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gorapabnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokirapabshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || rapabronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gorapabnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokirapabronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || rapabroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gorapabnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokirapabroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || rapabromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gorapabnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokirapabromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || rapabmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gorapabnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokirapabmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || rapabmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gorapabnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokirapabmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || rapabmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gorapabnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokirapabmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || rapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || ræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || horapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || horæpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohorapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohoræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nürapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünürapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïrapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïrapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lurapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulurapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lirapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || liræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilirapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || liliræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || korapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || koræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokorapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokoræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kerapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || keræpæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekerapab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekeræpæb
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
